chosen_action.title: Refresh canonical StackOverflow handoff packet from existing best draft
chosen_action.question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

why_this_action.summary: The post-cooldown StackOverflow lane would otherwise see the same qualified question as already drafted and risk a no-op. Refreshing the canonical packet from the existing draft turns duplicate detection into a reusable demand-capture asset.

expected_outcome: The next StackOverflow-compatible posting slot reuses a fresh canonical packet instead of generating duplicate-draft churn or stalling on cooldown aftermath.

measurement_window.success_metric: A live placement or manual reuse of the refreshed packet that sends qualified evaluators to Codeberg first.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the refreshed packet is still unused by the next review window, retire this lane for the week instead of refreshing it again.
